'''狐塚古墳'''（きつねづかこふん）は、日本の古墳の名称。同名の古墳が各地にある。
* [[鳥居原狐塚古墳]]（[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]大塚） - 赤烏元年鏡（[[重要文化財]]）が出土。 * 額田部狐塚古墳（奈良県[[大和郡山市]]額田部町） - [[馬見古墳群]]北群にある前方後円墳。 * 佐味田狐塚古墳（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[河合町]]佐味田） - 馬見古墳群中群にある帆立貝式古墳。 * [[茅原狐塚古墳]]（[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]茅原） - 石室長17メートル超の巨石古墳。 * [[曽根遺跡群|狐塚古墳（前原市）]]（[[福岡県]][[前原市]]） - 曽根遺跡群の古墳のひとつ。国史跡。 * [[中原狐塚古墳]]（福岡県[[久留米市]] 旧・[[浮羽郡]][[田主丸町]]） - 田主丸古墳群に属する[[装飾古墳]]。国史跡
{{aimai}} [[Category:日本の古墳|きつねつか こふん]]

revision.comment: 世田谷区の狐塚古墳を追加しました。
revision.text:

* [[鳥居原狐塚古墳]]（[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]大塚） - 赤烏元年鏡（[[重要文化財]]）が出土。 * 額田部狐塚古墳（奈良県[[大和郡山市]]額田部町） - [[馬見古墳群]]北群にある前方後円墳。 * 佐味田狐塚古墳（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[河合町]]佐味田） - 馬見古墳群中群にある帆立貝式古墳。 * [[茅原狐塚古墳]]（[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]茅原） - 石室長17メートル超の巨石古墳。 * [[曽根遺跡群|狐塚古墳（糸島市）]]（[[福岡県]][[糸島市]]） - 曽根遺跡群の古墳のひとつ。国の史跡。 * [http://kofun.info/kofun/2418 狐塚の石棺]（[[岐阜県]][[各務原市]]） - かつて古墳であった。現在は石棺が半分地面に埋まった状態で保存されている。各務原市鵜沼西町4丁目105番地にある。 * [[中原狐塚古墳]]（福岡県[[久留米市]] 旧・[[浮羽郡]][[田主丸町]]） - 田主丸古墳群に属する[[装飾古墳]]。国の史跡。 * [[宮内狐塚古墳]]（鳥取県[[湯梨浜町]]） * [[狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)]]（[[東京都]][[世田谷区]][[尾山台]]） - [[荏原台古墳群]]に属する円墳。

revision.comment: 調布市の狐塚古墳追加ほか。
revision.text:
'''狐塚古墳'''（きつねづかこふん）は、日本の古墳の名称。同名の古墳が各地にある。
* [[狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)]]（[[東京都]][[世田谷区]][[尾山台]]） - [[荏原台古墳群]]に属する円墳。 * [[狐塚古墳 (調布市)]]（東京都調布市布田） - 下布田古墳群に属する（下布田6号墳）。東京都指定史跡。<!--平成30年3月15日東京都公報より東京都教育委員会告示第8号--> * [[鳥居原狐塚古墳]]（[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]大塚） - 赤烏元年鏡（[[重要文化財]]）が出土。 * 額田部狐塚古墳（[[奈良県]][[大和郡山市]]額田部町） - [[馬見古墳群]]北群に属する前方後円墳。 * 佐味田狐塚古墳（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[河合町]]佐味田） - 馬見古墳群中群に属する帆立貝式古墳。 * [[茅原狐塚古墳]]（奈良県[[桜井市]]茅原） - 巨石古墳。 * 狐塚の石棺（[[岐阜県]][[各務原市]]） * [[宮内狐塚古墳]]（[[鳥取県]][[湯梨浜町]]） * 狐塚古墳 (糸島市)（[[福岡県]][[糸島市]]） - [[曽根遺跡群]]に属する。国の史跡。 * [[中原狐塚古墳]]（福岡県[[久留米市]]） - 田主丸古墳群に属する[[装飾古墳]]。国の史跡。
{{Aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:きつねつか こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.comment: Created page with "'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (ancient burial mounds) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}})..."
revision.text:
'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (ancient burial mounds) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).
{{disambiguation}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[ja:狐塚古墳]]

'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (ancient burial mounds) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).

* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).

Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).

Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).

Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).

revision.text:
'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳}} (ancient burial mounds) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).

revision.text:
'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群|1=Sone Sites}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).
{{disambiguation}}

'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群|1=Sone Sites}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).
{{disambiguation}}

revision.text:
'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群|1=Sone Sites}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県}}).

revision.text:
'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=draft}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|12=draft}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=draft}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=draft}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=draft}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡|12=draft}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市|12=draft}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県|12=draft}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群|1=Sone Sites|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県|12=draft}}).
{{disambiguation}}

'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Chichibu|ja|秩父市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Setagaya|ja|世田谷区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=draft}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|12=draft}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=draft}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=draft}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=draft}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡|12=draft}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市|12=draft}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県|12=draft}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群|1=Sone Sites|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県|12=draft}}).

Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|12=draft}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=draft}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=draft}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=draft}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡|12=draft}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市|12=draft}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県|12=draft}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群|1=Sone Sites|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県|12=draft}}).
{{disambiguation}}

Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ichikawa Misato|ja|市川三郷町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県|12=draft}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ukyo Ward|ja|右京区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=draft}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=draft}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|ja|大和郡山市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=draft}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai|ja|河合町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kita Katsuragi District|ja|北葛城郡|12=draft}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakurai|ja|桜井市|12=draft}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|ja|各務原市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Yurihama|ja|湯梨浜町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|ja|鳥取県|12=draft}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima|ja|糸島市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県|12=draft}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Archaeological Site Cluster|ja|曽根遺跡群|1=Sone Sites|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kurume|ja|久留米市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=draft}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nichinan|ja|日南市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|ja|宮崎県|12=draft}}).
{{disambiguation}}

19 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:狐塚古墳 up to rev 100545443
revision.text:
'''狐塚古墳'''（きつねづかこふん）は、日本の古墳の名称。同名の古墳が各地にある。
* [[狐塚古墳 (秩父市)]]（[[埼玉県]][[秩父市]]） - 円墳。 * [[狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)]]（[[東京都]][[世田谷区]][[尾山台]]） - [[荏原台古墳群]]に属する円墳。 * [[狐塚古墳 (調布市)]]（東京都調布市布田） - 下布田古墳群に属する（下布田6号墳）。東京都指定史跡。<!--平成30年3月15日東京都公報より東京都教育委員会告示第8号--> * [[鳥居原狐塚古墳]]（[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]大塚） - 赤烏元年鏡（[[重要文化財]]）が出土。 * [[狐塚古墳 (京都市)]]（[[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]嵯峨大覚寺門前堂ノ前町） *狐塚古墳 (大阪府堺市上野芝町) - 履中陵古墳の陪塚とされ、かつて存在した古墳。 * 額田部狐塚古墳（[[奈良県]][[大和郡山市]]額田部町） - [[馬見古墳群]]北群に属する前方後円墳。 * 佐味田狐塚古墳（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[河合町]]佐味田） - 馬見古墳群中群に属する帆立貝式古墳。 * [[茅原狐塚古墳]]（奈良県[[桜井市]]茅原） - 巨石古墳。 * 狐塚の石棺（[[岐阜県]][[各務原市]]） * [[宮内狐塚古墳]]（[[鳥取県]][[湯梨浜町]]） * 狐塚古墳 (糸島市)（[[福岡県]][[糸島市]]） - [[曽根遺跡群]]に属する。国の史跡。 * [[中原狐塚古墳]]（福岡県[[久留米市]]） - 田主丸古墳群に属する[[装飾古墳]]。国の史跡。 * [[狐塚古墳 (日南市)]]（宮崎県日南市）
{{Aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:きつねつか こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.text:
'''狐塚古墳'''（きつねづかこふん）は、日本の古墳の名称。同名の古墳が各地にある。
* [[狐塚古墳 (秩父市)]]（[[埼玉県]][[秩父市]]） - 円墳。 * [[狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)]]（[[東京都]][[世田谷区]][[尾山台]]） - [[荏原台古墳群]]に属する円墳。 * [[狐塚古墳 (調布市)]]（東京都調布市布田） - 下布田古墳群に属する（下布田6号墳）。東京都指定史跡。<!--平成30年3月15日東京都公報より東京都教育委員会告示第8号--> * [[鳥居原狐塚古墳]]（[[山梨県]][[市川三郷町]]大塚） - 赤烏元年鏡（[[重要文化財]]）が出土。 * [[狐塚古墳 (京都市)]]（[[京都府]][[京都市]][[右京区]]嵯峨大覚寺門前堂ノ前町） *狐塚古墳 (大阪府堺市上野芝町) - 履中陵古墳の陪塚とされ、かつて存在した古墳。 * 額田部狐塚古墳（[[奈良県]][[大和郡山市]]額田部町） - [[馬見古墳群]]北群に属する前方後円墳。 * 佐味田狐塚古墳（奈良県[[北葛城郡]][[河合町]]佐味田） - 馬見古墳群中群に属する帆立貝式古墳。 * [[茅原狐塚古墳]]（奈良県[[桜井市]]茅原） - 巨石古墳。 * 狐塚の石棺（[[岐阜県]][[各務原市]]） * [[宮内狐塚古墳]]（[[鳥取県]][[湯梨浜町]]） * 狐塚古墳 (糸島市)（[[福岡県]][[糸島市]]） - [[曽根遺跡群]]に属する。国の史跡。 * [[中原狐塚古墳]]（福岡県[[久留米市]]） - 田主丸古墳群に属する[[装飾古墳]]。国の史跡。 * [[狐塚古墳 (日南市)]]（宮崎県日南市）
{{Aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:きつねつか こふん}} [[Category:日本の古墳]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:狐塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|qq=|1=kitsunezukakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17211528}} ([[:en:Chichibu, Saitama|Chichibu]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|qq=|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47633006}} ([[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|qq=|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Chōfu|Chōfu]], Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} ([[:en:Ichikawamisato|Ichikawa Misato]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]]) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} ([[:en:Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto]], [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]]). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uenoshiba-chō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richūryō Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579711}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ([[:en:Yamatokōriyama|Yamatokōriyama]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Umami Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ([[:en:Kawai, Nara|Kawai]], [[:en:Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|Kita Katsuragi District]], Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=|1=Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617185}} ([[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai]], Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ([[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579712}} ([[:en:Yurihama, Tottori|Yurihama]], [[:en:Tottori Prefecture|Tottori Prefecture]]). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ([[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]) - Part of the [[:en:Sone Sites|Sone Sites]]; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579713}} ([[:en:Kurume|Kurume]], Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|qq=|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q128307755}} ([[:en:Nichinan, Miyazaki|Nichinan]], [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:狐塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|1=kitsunezukakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17211528}} ([[:en:Chichibu, Saitama|Chichibu]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47633006}} ([[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Chōfu|Chōfu]], Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} ([[:en:Ichikawamisato|Ichikawa Misato]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]]) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} ([[:en:Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto]], [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]]). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uenoshiba-chō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richūryō Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579711}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ([[:en:Yamatokōriyama|Yamatokōriyama]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Umami Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ([[:en:Kawai, Nara|Kawai]], [[:en:Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|Kita Katsuragi District]], Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|1=Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617185}} ([[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai]], Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ([[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579712}} ([[:en:Yurihama, Tottori|Yurihama]], [[:en:Tottori Prefecture|Tottori Prefecture]]). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ([[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]) - Part of the [[:en:Sone Sites|Sone Sites]]; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579713}} ([[:en:Kurume|Kurume]], Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}; revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:狐塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various [[:en:Kofun|Kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|1=kitsunezukakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17211528}} ([[:en:Chichibu, Saitama|Chichibu]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47633006}} ([[:en:Setagaya|Setagaya]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Chōfu|Chōfu]], Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} ([[:en:Ichikawamisato|Ichikawa Misato]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]]) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} ([[:en:Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto]], [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]]). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uenoshiba-chō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richūryō Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579711}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ([[:en:Yamatokōriyama|Yamatokōriyama]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Umami Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ([[:en:Kawai, Nara|Kawai]], [[:en:Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|Kita Katsuragi District]], Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|1=Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617185}} ([[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai]], Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ([[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579712}} ([[:en:Yurihama, Tottori|Yurihama]], [[:en:Tottori Prefecture|Tottori Prefecture]]). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ([[:en:Itoshima, Fukuoka|Itoshima]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]]) - Part of the [[:en:Sone Sites|Sone Sites]]; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579713}} ([[:en:Kurume|Kurume]], Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q128307755}} ([[:en:Nichinan, Miyazaki|Nichinan]], [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:狐塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:狐塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:狐塚古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11571377]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|1=kitsunezukakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17211528}} ({{ill|Chichibu, Saitama|en|Chichibu, Saitama|WD=Q647079|lt=Chichibu}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47633006}} ({{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Chōfu|en|Chōfu|WD=Q210667|lt=Chōfu}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} ({{ill|Ichikawamisato|en|Ichikawamisato|WD=Q1204453|lt=Ichikawa Misato}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|WD=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} ({{ill|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|WD=Q580186|lt=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uenoshiba-chō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richūryō Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579711}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|en|Yamatokōriyama|WD=Q118213|lt=Yamatokōriyama}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Umami Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai, Nara|en|Kawai, Nara|WD=Q1203880|lt=Kawai}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|en|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|WD=Q1131013|lt=Kita Katsuragi District}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|1=Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617185}} ({{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|WD=Q127026|lt=Sakurai}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579712}} ({{ill|Yurihama, Tottori|en|Yurihama, Tottori|WD=Q1156158|lt=Yurihama}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|WD=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima, Fukuoka|en|Itoshima, Fukuoka|WD=Q1011145|lt=Itoshima}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Sites|en|Sone Sites|WD=Q11515360|lt=Sone Sites}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579713}} ({{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|WD=Q320934|lt=Kurume}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q128307755}} ({{ill|Nichinan, Miyazaki|en|Nichinan, Miyazaki|WD=Q860669|lt=Nichinan}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|WD=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture}}).

'''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|1=kitsunezukakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17211528}} ({{ill|Chichibu, Saitama|en|Chichibu, Saitama|WD=Q647079|lt=Chichibu}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47633006}} ({{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Chōfu|en|Chōfu|WD=Q210667|lt=Chōfu}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} ({{ill|Ichikawamisato|en|Ichikawamisato|WD=Q1204453|lt=Ichikawa Misato}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|WD=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} ({{ill|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|WD=Q580186|lt=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uenoshiba-chō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Sakai; '''Kitsunezuka Kofun''' (狐塚古墳) refers to various {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|WD=Q1141225|lt=Kofun}} (ancient Kofuns) in Japan. These kofun share the same name and are found in different regions.
* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|1=kitsunezukakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17211528}} ({{ill|Chichibu, Saitama|en|Chichibu, Saitama|WD=Q647079|lt=Chichibu}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47633006}} ({{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Chōfu|en|Chōfu|WD=Q210667|lt=Chōfu}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} ({{ill|Ichikawamisato|en|Ichikawamisato|WD=Q1204453|lt=Ichikawa Misato}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|WD=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} ({{ill|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|WD=Q580186|lt=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uenoshiba-chō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richūryō Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579711}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|en|Yamatokōriyama|WD=Q118213|lt=Yamatokōriyama}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Umami Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai, Nara|en|Kawai, Nara|WD=Q1203880|lt=Kawai}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|en|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|WD=Q1131013|lt=Kita Katsuragi District}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|1=Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617185}} ({{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|WD=Q127026|lt=Sakurai}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579712}} ({{ill|Yurihama, Tottori|en|Yurihama, Tottori|WD=Q1156158|lt=Yurihama}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|WD=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima, Fukuoka|en|Itoshima, Fukuoka|WD=Q1011145|lt=Itoshima}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Sites|en|Sone Sites|WD=Q11515360|lt=Sone Sites}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579713}} ({{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|WD=Q320934|lt=Kurume}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q128307755}} ({{ill|Nichinan, Miyazaki|en|Nichinan, Miyazaki|WD=Q860669|lt=Nichinan}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|WD=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture}}).

* {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (秩父市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chichibu)|1=kitsunezukakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17211528}} ({{ill|Chichibu, Saitama|en|Chichibu, Saitama|WD=Q647079|lt=Chichibu|1=Chichibu, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}) - Circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|ja|狐塚古墳 (世田谷区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Setagaya)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q47633006}} ({{ill|Setagaya|en|Setagaya|WD=Q231645|lt=Setagaya|1=Setagaya}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}) - Part of the {{ill|Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|ja|荏原台古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebaradai Kofun Cluster|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11618305}}; circular kofun. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja|狐塚古墳 (調布市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Chōfu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Chōfu|en|Chōfu|WD=Q210667|lt=Chōfu|1=Chōfu}}, Tokyo) - Belongs to the Shimo-Fuda Kofun Cluster (Shimo-Fuda No. 6 Kofun). Designated as a Tokyo Metropolitan Historic Site. * {{ill|Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|鳥居原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toriibara Kitsunezuka Kofun|qq=}} ({{ill|Ichikawamisato|en|Ichikawamisato|WD=Q1204453|lt=Ichikawa Misato|1=Ichikawamisato}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|WD=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}) - Known for the excavation of the Akauru Gannen Mirror (Important Cultural Property). * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto City)|lt=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|狐塚古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Kyoto)|qq=}} ({{ill|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|en|Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|WD=Q580186|lt=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto|1=Ukyō-ku, Kyoto}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Sakai, Osaka) - Located in {{ill|Uenoshiba-chō|ja|上野芝町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uenoshiba-chō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Sakai; was an associated mound of the {{ill|Richūryō Kofun|ja|履中陵古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Richūryō Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579711|1=Richūryō Kofun}}, but no longer exists. * Nukatabe Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Yamatokōriyama|en|Yamatokōriyama|WD=Q118213|lt=Yamatokōriyama|1=Yamatokōriyama}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}) - A keyhole-shaped kofun part of the northern group of the {{ill|Mami Kofun Cluster|ja|馬見古墳群|1=Umami Kofun Cluster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mami Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Umami Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. * Samita Kitsunezuka Kofun ({{ill|Kawai, Nara|en|Kawai, Nara|WD=Q1203880|lt=Kawai|1=Kawai, Nara}}, {{ill|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|en|Kitakatsuragi District, Nara|WD=Q1131013|lt=Kita Katsuragi District|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, Nara) - A scallop-shaped kofun in the central group of the Mami Kofun Cluster. * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|1=Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11617185}} ({{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|WD=Q127026|lt=Sakurai|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, Nara) - Known for its large stones. * Kitsunezuka Stone Sarcophagus ({{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara|1=Kakamigahara}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}). * {{ill|Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|宮内狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579712|1=Miyauchi Kitsunezuka Kofun}} ({{ill|Yurihama, Tottori|en|Yurihama, Tottori|WD=Q1156158|lt=Yurihama|1=Yurihama, Tottori}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|WD=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture|1=Tottori Prefecture}}). * Kitsunezuka Kofun (Itoshima) ({{ill|Itoshima, Fukuoka|en|Itoshima, Fukuoka|WD=Q1011145|lt=Itoshima|1=Itoshima}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}) - Part of the {{ill|Sone Sites|en|Sone Sites|WD=Q11515360|lt=Sone Sites|1=Sone Sites}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja|中原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579713|1=Nakabaru Kitsunezuka Kofun}} ({{ill|Kurume|en|Kurume|WD=Q320934|lt=Kurume|1=Kurume}}, Fukuoka) - An ornamental kofun within the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja|田主丸古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}; a national historic site. * {{ill|Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|ja|狐塚古墳 (日南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|1=Kitsunezuka Kofun (Nichinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q128307755}} ({{ill|Nichinan, Miyazaki|en|Nichinan, Miyazaki|WD=Q860669|lt=Nichinan|1=Nichinan, Miyazaki}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|WD=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}).
